Title: Successful User Registration
Preconditions: User has an Android device with internet access
Test Data: Valid email (e.g., test@example.com), strong password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!), full name (e.g., John Doe)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter valid email address.
4. Enter a strong password.
5. Re-enter the same password.
6. Enter full name.
7. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: User account is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the login screen with a confirmation message.

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: User has registered and verified account
Test Data: Registered email (e.g., test@example.com), correct password (e.g., P@ssw0rd!)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter registered email address.
4. Enter correct password.
5. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the home screen.

Title: Successful Profile Update
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Updated full name (e.g., John Smith), updated phone number (e.g., +393123456789)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and log in.
2. Navigate to the profile section.
3. Click on "Modifica profilo" (Edit Profile).
4. Enter updated full name.
5. Enter updated phone number.
6. Click the "Salva" (Save) button.
Expected Result: Profile is updated successfully, and changes are reflected in the profile section.

Title: Successful Creation of Rental Object
Module: Creazione Oggetto da Noleggiare (Create Rental Object)
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Object name (e.g., Drill), object description (e.g., High-quality drill), rental price (e.g., 5 EUR/day), availability (e.g., Available from 01/01/2023 to 31/12/2023)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and log in.
2. Navigate to the "Crea oggetto da noleggiare" (Create Rental Object) section.
3. Enter object name.
4. Enter object description.
5. Enter rental price.
6. Set availability dates.
7. Click the "Crea" (Create) button.
Expected Result: Object is listed successfully in the user's rental objects section.

Title: Successful Deletion of Rental Object
Module: Eliminazione Oggetto da Noleggiare (Delete Rental Object)
Preconditions: User has created and listed at least one rental object
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and log in.
2. Navigate to the user's rental objects section.
3. Select the object to delete (e.g., Drill).
4. Click the "Elimina" (Delete) button.
5. Confirm deletion in the pop-up dialog.
Expected Result: Object is removed from the rental objects list, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Successful Request for Rental Object
Module: Richiesta Oggetto in Noleggio (Request Rental Object)
Preconditions: User is logged in, and there is at least one available rental object listed by another user
Test Data: Available rental object (e.g., Drill), rental dates (e.g., 15/01/2023 to 16/01/2023)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and log in.
2. Navigate to the rental objects section.
3. Search for and select an available object (e.g., Drill).
4. Enter rental dates.
5. Click the "Richiedi" (Request) button.
Expected Result: Request is sent successfully to the object owner, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Successful Creation of Service
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data: Service name (e.g., Home Cleaning), service description (e.g., Cleaning of entire apartment), service price (e.g., 30 EUR), service area (e.g., Mestre)
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and log in.
2. Navigate to the "Crea servizio" (Create Service) section.
3. Enter service name.
4. Enter service description.
5. Enter service price.
6. Select service area.
7. Click the "Crea" (Create) button.
Expected Result: Service is listed successfully in the user's service offerings section.

Title: Successful Deletion of Service
Preconditions: User has created and listed at least one service
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and log in.
2. Navigate to the user's service offerings section.
3. Select the service to delete (e.g., Home Cleaning).
4. Click the "Elimina" (Delete) button.
5. Confirm deletion in the pop-up dialog.
Expected Result: Service is removed from the service offerings list, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Successful Request for Service
Preconditions: User is logged in, and there is at least one available service listed by another user
Test Data: Available service (e.g., Home Cleaning), service date (e.g., 20/01/2023)
Test Steps:

2. Navigate to the services section.
3. Search for and select an available service (e.g., Home Cleaning).
4. Enter service date.
5. Click the "Richiedi" (Request) button.
Expected Result: Request is sent successfully to the service provider, and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Successful Creation of Advertisement
Preconditions: User is logged in

Title: Successful Deletion of Advertisement
Preconditions: User has created and posted at least one advertisement

2. Navigate to the user's advertisements section.

Title: Launch Application
Preconditions: The application must be installed on the smartphone.
Test Steps:
1. Locate the application icon on the smartphone home screen.
2. Perform a "tap" on the application icon.
Expected Result: The application launches successfully.

Title: Successful User Registration
Preconditions: The application must be installed on the smartphone.
Test Data: Valid username, valid email, valid password
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time or after logout.
2. Select the registration option on the login/registration screen.
3. Insert a valid username in the username field.
4. Insert a valid email in the email field.
5. Insert a valid password in the password field.
6. Confirm the registration by tapping the submit button.
Expected Result: The user profile is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the main application screen.

Title: Registration with Existing Email
Preconditions: The application must be installed on the smartphone. An account with the same email already exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application for the first time or after logout.
2. Select the registration option on the login/registration screen.
3. Insert a username in the username field.
4. Insert an existing email in the email field.
5. Insert a valid password in the password field.
6. Confirm the registration by tapping the submit button.
Expected Result: The application displays an error message indicating that the email is already registered.

Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions: The application must be installed on the smartphone. The user must have already registered.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application or log out if already logged in.
2. Select the login option on the login/registration screen.
3. Insert a valid username or email in the username/email field.
4. Insert the correct password in the password field.
5. Confirm login by tapping the submit button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main application screen.

Title: Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: The application must be installed on the smartphone. The user must have already registered.

2. Select the login option on the login/registration screen.
3. Insert a valid username or email in the username/email field.
4. Insert an incorrect password in the password field.
5. Confirm login by tapping the submit button.
Expected Result: The application displays an error message indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Modify User Profile Information

5. Select the option to modify password.

7. Confirm the changes by tapping the save button.

Title: Verify Account Data Removal from Database
Preconditions: User is logged in with an active account containing profile data and services.
Test Data: Valid user credentials, sample profile data, sample service entries.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to account settings.
2. User selects "Delete Account" option.
3. System prompts for confirmation with a warning message.
4. User confirms deletion.
Expected Result: All user-specific data (profile, services) is permanently removed from the Firebase database. Subsequent login attempts with the same credentials fail.

Title: Verify Automatic Data Cleanup on Uninstall
Preconditions: Application is installed on an Android device with cached data (e.g., local storage, temporary files).
Test Steps:
1. User initiates uninstallation of the application via device settings.
2. System displays confirmation dialog.
3. User confirms uninstallation.
Expected Result: All application-specific data (cached files, local storage) is automatically deleted from the device without manual intervention.

Title: Verify User-Friendly Error Message for Missing Service Field
Preconditions: User is in the service creation/editing screen.
Test Data: Incomplete service entry (e.g., missing required field like "service name").
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to submit a service with a mandatory field left blank.
2. System validates input and detects the missing field.
Expected Result: A clear, user-friendly error message appears, e.g., "Please fill in the service name." The submission is blocked until the field is completed.

Title: Verify Installation on Android 6.0+
Preconditions: Android device with version 6.0 or higher, 200MB+ free storage.
Test Steps:
1. User downloads and installs the APK on an Android 6.0+ device.
2. System checks device compatibility during installation.
Expected Result: Installation completes successfully without errors. App launches and functions as expected.

Title: Verify Rejection on Android <6.0
Preconditions: Android device with version below 6.0 (e.g., 5.1).
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to install the APK on an unsupported device.
Expected Result: Installation fails with a clear error message: "This app requires Android 6.0 or higher."

Title: Verify App Launch Time
Preconditions: Device meets minimum requirements (Android 6.0+, 200MB storage).
Test Steps:
1. User taps the app icon to launch.
2. System timer measures time from icon press to home screen appearance.
Expected Result: App launches within 4 seconds. No freezing or unresponsive behavior is observed.

Title: Verify User Interaction Response Time
Preconditions: App is open and loaded.
Test Data: Sample user action (e.g., tapping a button).
Test Steps:
1. User performs a standard action (e.g., navigating to a new screen).
2. System timer measures time from action initiation to completion (e.g., screen transition).
Expected Result: Interaction completes within 4 seconds. No lag or delay is perceptible.

Title: Verify Intuitive Navigation to Objective in ≤3 Errors
Preconditions: Fresh user with no prior app experience.
Test Steps:
1. User is given a goal (e.g., "Book a service").
2. User attempts to achieve the goal without guidance.
3. System tracks number of incorrect actions (e.g., wrong taps, misclicks).
Expected Result: User achieves the goal within 3 or fewer errors. Interface elements are clearly labeled and logically placed.

Title: Verify Firebase Response Time for Data Operations
Preconditions: App is connected to Firebase with active internet.
Test Data: Sample data entry (e.g., new service record).
Test Steps:
1. User submits data requiring Firebase write operation (e.g., creating a service).
2. System timer measures time from submission to confirmation.
Expected Result: Operation completes within 3 seconds. Success/failure feedback is provided to the user.

Title: Verify Concurrent User Data Access
Preconditions: Multiple test accounts are logged in simultaneously.
Test Data: Unique data entries per account (e.g., services, profiles).
Test Steps:
1. Two users perform conflicting operations (e.g., both editing the same service).
2. System monitors for data corruption or conflicts.
Expected Result: Firebase handles concurrent access without errors. Final data state reflects the last valid operation. No data loss or inconsistency occurs.

Title: Verify Minimum Storage Space Check
Preconditions: Device has <200MB free storage.
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to install the app on a device with insufficient storage.
Expected Result: Installation fails with an error message: "Insufficient storage. Requires 200MB free space."

Title: Verify GDPR-Compliant Data Handling
Preconditions: User account with personal data (e.g., email, name).
Test Data: Sensitive user data (e.g., email, partial credit card number if applicable).
Test Steps:
1. User requests account deletion via settings.
2. System processes deletion request.
Expected Result: All personal data is permanently deleted from Firebase and local storage. No residual data remains in logs or caches. User receives a confirmation email (if applicable) with deletion details.
